patches.title: Ordered Container Search
patches.trigger: target object not visible and multiple plausible containers exist (e.g., numbered drawers, cabinets)
action_flow: select a logical order (e.g., ascending indices for similar containers) based on observation
visit each container in that order exactly once without skipping
for each closed container, open and inspect contents immediately
if target found, acquire it and proceed to next phase; if empty, move to the next container in order
avoid: skipping containers in the chosen order
patches.principle: target object not visible and multiple plausible containers exist (e.g., numbered drawers, cabinets). Steps: select a logical order (e.g., ascending indices for similar containers) based on observation; visit each container in that order exactly once without skipping; for each closed container, open and inspect contents immediately; if target found, acquire it and proceed to next phase; if empty, move to the next container in order
patches.when_to_apply: target object not visible and multiple plausible containers exist (e.g., numbered drawers, cabinets)

patches.title: Prefer Open Over Examine
patches.trigger: at a closed container while searching for a target object, with 'open' and 'examine' both admissible
action_flow: immediately choose the 'open' action without using 'examine' first
after opening, inspect contents for target
if empty, close or move on according to the search strategy
avoid: using 'examine' on a closed container before opening
delaying the open action with intermediate reasoning about state
patches.principle: at a closed container while searching for a target object, with 'open' and 'examine' both admissible. Steps: immediately choose the 'open' action without using 'examine' first; after opening, inspect contents for target; if empty, close or move on according to the search strategy
patches.when_to_apply: at a closed container while searching for a target object, with 'open' and 'examine' both admissible

patches.title: Pivot Without Closing
patches.trigger: after opening a container and confirming it is empty during a search
action_flow: do not close the empty container if the task does not require it
immediately navigate to the next plausible container in your search order
continue the search without wasting steps on closing
avoid: lingering at an empty container to re-examine it
patches.principle: after opening a container and confirming it is empty during a search. Steps: do not close the empty container if the task does not require it; immediately navigate to the next plausible container in your search order; continue the search without wasting steps on closing
patches.when_to_apply: after opening a container and confirming it is empty during a search
